text.title: backlog-management Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for backlog-management as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Vague item title like "Better search" or "Fix dashboard".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague titles require a conversation to decode intent. Reformulate as "Add autocomplete to product search" — action-oriented, scoped, estimable.

failure-mode.description: LLM-rewritten user stories that paraphrase the original request.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Original requestor wording is signal; agent paraphrasing destroys it. Keep original text under a Raw Request section in every item.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: T-shirt sizing without calibration against past delivery is dart-throwing. Bootstrap from last 30 closed items before trusting agent estimates.

failure-mode.description: Auto-merging "similar" items based on semantic similarity alone.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Wrong merges destroy audit trail and lose distinct customer requests. Require 0.9+ similarity score AND human accept before merging.
